meta.title: Proteins of Herpesvirus Saimiri: Identification of Two Virus Polypeptides Released into the Culture Medium of Productively Infected Cells

abstractHtml: Two virus-induced polypeptides are preferentially released into the culture medium of owl monkey kidney cells productively infected with herpesvirus saimiri (HVS). These polypeptides have apparent mol. wt. of 160 x 103 and 28 x 103 and are the major virus-induced polypeptides in a membrane fraction from infected cells. Both these excreted polypeptides co-migrate with virus structural proteins and are selectively released from enveloped virus particles by treatment with Nonidet-P40.
